info.name: Stanley Black & Decker Tool Connect API

description.content:
The Stanley Black & Decker Tool Connect API enables partner integration with DEWALT's connected tool management platform. Partners can access tool inventory, track Bluetooth-connected tools and batteries, manage jobsite assets, and synchronize tool usage data. Used by fleet management software, construction platforms, and enterprise tool management solutions.

Contact Support:
 Name: DEWALT Developer Support
